title: TypeScript package runnable adapters and conformance
goal: Implement GitHub #822 and #823 together: derive generated TypeScript conformance from command conformance_refs, then promote the Planning and Memory generated TypeScript packages from metadata-only fixtures to runnable read-only adapters.

The lane is complete when planning-cli and memory-cli generated TypeScript packages expose runnable read-only entrypoints, hand off to the canonical package runtimes, and pass local plus Docker conformance through the generated-package checks.
non_goals: Do not promote the root TypeScript adapter to weak-agent-safe; GitHub #824 stays deferred.
Do not add mutation-capable TypeScript adapters.
Do not relocate generated Python adapters under generated/python; GitHub #661 stays deferred.
Do not publish packages or change release packaging beyond generated package metadata needed for local proof.

intent.outcome: Generated TypeScript planning-cli and memory-cli read-only adapters are runnable, and generated TypeScript conformance is contract-derived instead of manually mirrored.
intent.constraints: Keep scope bounded to GitHub #822 and #823 plus generated outputs and focused proof updates.
intent.latitude: Use bounded evidence-backed improvements that make generation, proof, or agent operation cheaper and safer; report incidental dogfooding findings even when not fixed.
intent.escalation: Escalate when a better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, requires mutation semantics, changes package publishing policy, or attempts to close GitHub #824.

execution.next_step: Inspect src/agentic_workspace/contracts/command_package_ir.json, packages/command-generation/src/agentic_command_generation/generator.py, and scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py to identify the narrow implementation path.
execution.proof: Generated command packages regenerate cleanly and pass local plus Docker conformance for root, planning, and memory TypeScript packages.

invariants: Preserve the planning contract and keep the work bounded to this plan.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: TypeScript command generation can produce runnable, proof-backed package-local adapters without hand-maintained conformance mirrors.

iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: Weak-agent-safe root TypeScript adapter promotion remains deferred to GitHub #824.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: continue the current milestone until the completion criteria are met

intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Promote the coherent P1 TypeScript generation lane made from GitHub #822 and #823, leaving lower-priority #824 deferred.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Activate a single execplan covering TypeScript package runnable adapters and contract-derived conformance.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Confirm the scaffolded plan still matches the promoted item before broad implementation.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: Generated command package IR, TypeScript generator/checker surfaces, generated TypeScript planning/memory packages, generated mirrors touched by regeneration, focused tests/proofs, and this planning state.
execution_bounds.max changed files: About 20 files; stop and reassess if implementation needs broad architectural rewrites outside generation/proof surfaces.
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run python scripts/generate/generate_command_packages.py --check; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --conformance --require-node; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --docker --require-docker; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --docker-conformance --require-docker; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace reconcile --format json
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Ask before introducing a new runtime abstraction, changing command semantics, or promoting weak-agent-safe behavior.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Unrelated roadmap candidates, publishing/release automation, external host repos, or mutation-capable CLI behavior.

stop_conditions.stop when: The work no longer matches the promoted item or its completion criteria.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: A correct fix requires changing the requested outcome or ownership boundary.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: Implementation needs files outside the filled execution bounds.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: The selected proof cannot demonstrate the completion criteria.

context_budget.externalize before shift: Update execution_run, proof_report, finished_run_review, and closeout_distillation before pausing.
context_budget.pre-work config pull: Use compact config/startup/summary outputs before opening raw planning or routing files.
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: Route to the narrowest relevant memory only when the task needs durable repo knowledge.
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Active lane #822/#823: derive TypeScript conformance from IR conformance refs and make planning-cli/memory-cli generated TypeScript packages runnable read-only adapters.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Proof failure, scope drift, interruption, handoff, or closeout.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Generated TypeScript planning-cli and memory-cli read-only adapters are runnable, and conformance comes from command conformance_refs.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Keep scope bounded to GitHub #822/#823; leave #824 weak-agent-safe promotion deferred.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Bounded decomposition, touched-path narrowing, validation tightening, generated-output cleanup, and plan-local residue routing.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: A better-looking fix changes command semantics, requires mutation support, broadens publishing policy, or closes deferred weak-agent-safe work.

completion_criteria: TypeScript generated-package conformance is derived from command_package_ir.json conformance_refs rather than hand-maintained command mirrors.
generated/typescript/planning-cli and generated/typescript/memory-cli expose runnable read-only CLI entrypoints that delegate to canonical package runtimes.
Local, Node conformance, Docker package, and Docker conformance generated-package checks pass or any unavailable environment proof is explicitly recorded.
GitHub #822 and #823 can be closed with evidence; GitHub #824 remains open unless separately promoted.

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open.
